case_title: ADVANTAGE COMMUNICATIONS GROUP, INC. VS BRAL, ROBERT DBA BITTEL CORP.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,573.47 FILED BY ADVANTAGE COMMUNICATIONS GROUP, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BRAL, ROBERT DBA BITTEL CORP. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-05-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BRAL, ROBERT DBA BITTEL CORP.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ADVANTAGE COMMUNICATIONS GROUP, INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BRAL, ROBERT DBA BITTEL CORP. PLAINTIFF HAS MORE THAN ONE SMALL CLAIMS TO CIRCUMVENT THR $5000 LIMIT. DEFENDANT WOULD STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
